title: Mr. Paradox
content:
{{AltUniverse|3=Characters}} {{Stub}} {{Character |image = Paradox.png |alias = {{Alias |primary = Mr. Paradox{{Ref|DW}}}} |species = [[Human]] |gender = Male |title = [[TVA]] Agent |affiliation = {{Affiliation|TVA}}
*[[Mr. Paradox's Crew]] (formerly) |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Matthew Macfadyen]] |status = In Custody}} {{Quote|No matter what my so-called superiors say, the [[Multiverse]] does not need a babysitter, we need a mercy killer. And in this instance, I am the mercy killer!|Mr. Paradox to [[Deadpool]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''Mr. Paradox''' is a rogue agent who worked for the [[Time Variance Authority]] and was placed in charge of overseeing timelines within the [[Multiverse]]. Having constructed an unauthorized [[Time Ripper]] capable of destroying timelines entirely, Paradox planned to accelerate the destruction of [[Earth-10005]] due to the death of its [[Glossary#Anchor Being|Anchor Being]], [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|Wolverine]]. He recruited [[Deadpool]] and gave him the chance to relocate to Earth-616, but this act backfired heavily when Deadpool learned of Paradox's conspiracy and escaped to different realities. Later, Paradox had Deadpool and an alternate [[Wolverine]] pruned to the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]], before they both ultimately returned to Earth-10005 to stop Paradox. [[Cassandra Nova]], having extracted information from Paradox's sleeper agent [[Pyro]], angrily confronted him and decided to destroy all timelines, but her plans were foiled by Deadpool and Wolverine. After the [[Preservation of Earth-10005|conflict]], Paradox was arrested by his former leader [[B-15]] for his defection. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Working with the TVA==== {{Quote|I have been tasked with overseeing the end of your [[Earth-10005|universe]]. And regardless of what the pencil pushers upstairs would prefer, I will not waste my life watching it die slowly of natural causes.|Mr. Paradox to [[Deadpool]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Paradox was born as a [[human]] on the [[Sacred Timeline]] who became a Variant and caused a divergence, causing him to be taken by the [[Time Variance Authority]] and have his memory suppressed so that he could become a member of the organization.{{Ref|LK204}} However, despite initially loving his job at the TVA, when the organization decided to stop pruning timelines, Paradox was given the responsibility of watching all the timelines of the [[Multiverse]], including the Sacred Timeline and [[Earth-10005]], seeing many universes getting slowly destroyed thanks to the death of their [[Glossary#Anchor Being|anchor beings]], with him being also responsible of watching each of those universes slowly wither away. Tired and irritated by the TVA's new direction, Paradox secretly ordered the creation of a [[Time Ripper]] in order to accelerate the process, with fellow TVA agents who were also opposed to the new TVA's direction helping him. When his idol, the [[Wolverine/Earth-10005|anchor being]] of Earth-10005, died, which resulted in his whole timeline starting to unravel, Paradox decided to test the new Time Ripper on his universe, but not before deciding to recruit Deadpool by offering him the chance to join the Sacred Timeline, sending [[Minutemen]] to do the job.{{Ref|DW}} ===Meeting Wade Wilson=== {{Quote|Mr. Wilson. You appear to have soiled yourself while unconscious."
"I wasn't unconscious. Who are you?"
"I go by the name of Paradox, Mr. Paradox. And you're sitting here at the TVA, the [[Time Variance Authority]].|Mr. Paradox and [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} ''To be added''{{Ref|DW}} ===Offering Wilson a Change=== {{Quote|I brought you here to offer you a opportunity, a opportunity you sought [[2018|years ago]] before you were ready. We believe you’re ready now. Ready for the chance to leave [[Earth-10005|your timeline]] and join the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe|greatest universe]] of all time. I'm about to give you the thing you always wanted.|Mr. Paradox to [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} ''To be added''{{Ref|DW}} ===Pruning Deadpool and Wolverine to the Void=== {{Quote|My God. You actually think you can replace an Anchor Being with [[Wolverine|this]]? I wouldn't have accepted any other Wolverine, BT dubs. But you have outdone yourself and brought me the worst Wolverine!"
"What do you mean, the worst one?"
"Mr. Wilson, this Wolverine let down his [[Mutant Genocide Universe|entire world]]. He's the stuff of legend, but not in a good way. And what he did, well, some things are just beyond forgiveness.|Mr. Paradox and [[Deadpool]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} ''To be added''{{Ref|DW}} ===Report from Pyro=== ''To be added''{{Ref|DW}} ===Confronted and Ambushed by Cassandra Nova=== ''To be added''{{Ref|DW}} ===Directing the Heroes to the Time Ripper=== ''To be added''{{Ref|DW}} ===Arrested by the TVA=== ''To be added''{{Ref|DW}} ==Abilities== *'''Expert Tactician''': ''To be added'' ==Equipment== ====Weapons==== *'''[[Time Stick]]''': Paradox had a Time Stick as a weapon when Deadpool threatened to expose his conspiracy plan, which he subsequently used to prune Deadpool and Wolverine into the Void to prevent further complications. ====Other Equipment==== *'''[[TemPad]]''': As a member of the TVA bureaucracy, Mr. Paradox carries with him a standard TemPad, which has multiple capabilities, including displaying footage of what happened in the timelines and also the diagrammatic overview of the state of different timelines. ==Facilities== {{Expand}} *'''[[Time Variance Authority Office]]''': ''To be added'' *'''[[24th Street Station|Time Variance Authority Outpost]]''': Being tasked to oversee Earth-10005, Paradox mainly worked at the TVA outpost in that reality, which is located in an underground metro network. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Mr. Paradox's Crew]] - Former Subordinates **[[Ralph (TVA)|Ralph]] **[[Pyro|John Allerdyce/Pyro]] † {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Cassandra Nova]] † *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Temporary Ally *[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] *[[Peter Wisdom]] *[[Time Variance Authority]] - Former Allies and Colleagues **[[B-15]] - Leader **[[Minutemen]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Judge Paradox is a [[Time Variance Authority]] judge who presided during the trial of [[She-Hulk]]. **[[Dox]] is based on the same character. ==Behind the Scenes== *''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' casting director [[Sarah Halley Finn]] had a hard time casting Mr. Paradox, holding auditions, going back and forth looking for someone audiences could love to hate and be charmed by, knowing that the character would share scenes with "heavyhitters" such as [[Ryan Reynolds (actor)|Ryan Reynolds]] and [[Hugh Jackman]] so he had to "exert power" and be funny, intelligent and ridiculous, with [[Matthew Macfadyen]] having all of that.[https://variety.com/2025/artisans/news/jonathan-bailey-almost-missed-wicked-1236295150/ Casting Directors Reveal How Jonathan Bailey Almost Missed Out on ‘Wicked’ and Why Emma Corrin Made the Perfect ‘Deadpool & Wolverine’ Villain] *[[Matthew Macfadyen]] opines that Mr. Paradox isn't a villain, but secretly wishes to be either a supervillain or a superhero over monitoring timelines for the [[Time Variance Authority]], probably wishing he were [[Cassandra Nova]]: "''I think he's just a sort of I think he's a terrible sort of apparatchik, who's frustrated and disgruntled and probably is looking to improve his lot – and he has issues''".[https://www.gamesradar.com/entertainment/marvel-movies/deadpool-and-wolverine-matthew-macfadyen-paradox-villain-exclusive-interview-deadpool-3/ Deadpool and Wolverine star Matthew Macfadyen doesn’t think Paradox is a villain – but wishes he was] ==References== {{Gallery|Mr. Paradox/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links==
